rules.note: Introductory Claude Sonnet 5 rate reported in prerelease/API migration materials: $2 per 1M input tokens through 2026-08-31; pending official Anthropic pricing confirmation.
Introductory Claude Sonnet 5 cache-read rate derived from the $2 per 1M input token introductory rate using Anthropic's standard 0.1x cache-read convention; pending official confirmation.
Introductory Claude Sonnet 5 5-minute cache-write rate derived from the $2 per 1M input token introductory rate using Anthropic's standard 1.25x cache-write convention; pending official confirmation.
Introductory Claude Sonnet 5 rate reported in prerelease/API migration materials: $10 per 1M output tokens through 2026-08-31; pending official Anthropic pricing confirmation.
Standard Claude Sonnet 5 rate reported in prerelease/API migration materials: $3 per 1M input tokens after the introductory window; pending official Anthropic pricing confirmation.
Standard Claude Sonnet 5 cache-read rate derived from the $3 per 1M input token rate using Anthropic's standard 0.1x cache-read convention; pending official confirmation.
Standard Claude Sonnet 5 5-minute cache-write rate derived from the $3 per 1M input token rate using Anthropic's standard 1.25x cache-write convention; pending official confirmation.
Standard Claude Sonnet 5 rate reported in prerelease/API migration materials: $15 per 1M output tokens after the introductory window; pending official Anthropic pricing confirmation.
